description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-split-button` (T2-28). 3/6 libraries. NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-button/` (includes hx-menu-item).

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, primary action vs dropdown trigger typing, menu-item typing
2. Accessibility — primary button and dropdown trigger are separate focusable elements, dropdown trigger has `aria-haspopup="menu"` and `aria-expanded`, menu has `role="menu"`, items have `role="menuitem"`, keyboard (Enter/Space on primary, arrow keys in menu, Escape closes), axe-core pass
3. Tests — primary action fires, dropdown opens/closes, menu item selection, keyboard nav through menu, disabled states
4. Storybook — all variants, menu item types, disabled primary/items
5. CSS — connected primary+trigger appearance, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-button/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-split-button — T2-28 antagonistic quality review
